description: The "Facilitator Pro & Session Continuity" track elevates Pointy from a real-time prototype to a professional-grade power tool by bridging the gap between high-fidelity dashboards and mobile-first haptic controllers. It introduces a secure, token-based Identity Sync protocol that allows any participant to transform their mobile device into a dedicated "PWA Hand" while maintaining their desktop session as a shared "Big Screen" dashboard. To enhance meeting tempo, the track implements a facilitator-controlled Round Timer and a "Nudge" mechanism to prompt remaining voters via haptic feedback. Finally, it ensures project continuity with a Markdown Session Exporter for migrating ephemeral estimates into permanent task trackers, alongside advanced room configurations like Auto-Reveal and T-Shirt Sizing scales to support diverse team workflows.
